{"id":"project-LICHEN-8qos","title":"TUI log event is vulnerable to Rich markup injection","description":"File: python/src/lichen/tui/app.py
Line: 327

The _log_event method writes user/network-supplied message content with Rich markup:

    log.write(f"[{color}][{timestamp}] {message}[/{color}]")

If 'message' contains Rich markup characters like '[bold]' or malformed tags like '[/', this could:
1. Corrupt the log display
2. Allow injection of unexpected styling
3. Potentially cause Rich parsing errors

Example: A payload containing '[/red]injected[red]' would break the intended color wrapping.

Impact: Display corruption, potential DoS via malformed markup causing exceptions.

Fix: Escape the message before interpolation:
    from rich.markup import escape
    log.write(f"[{color}][{timestamp}] {escape(message)}[/{color}]")","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:28:42.811331Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:28:42.811364Z"}
